overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian robes walking through a desert temple complex. The character progresses from an avenue lined with sphinx statues through walled corridors and palm groves toward a distant smoky settlement, with bright midday sun illuminating the sandy terrain and stone architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: avenue of sphinx statues leading to stone obelisk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path toward the stone obelisk, passing the row of sphinx statues on the right

entered.detail: large dark stone sphinx statues lining the right side of the path
tall stone tower/obelisk structure rising in the distance ahead
ancient stone wall running along the left side of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sandy temple avenue flanked by large sphinx statues on the right and stone walls on the left. The bright midday sun illuminates the path toward a tall stone obelisk in the distance, with sparse palm trees visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: walled corridor with view of distant smoke

events.description: entering narrow corridor between high stone walls, leaving the open avenue with sphinx statues

agents.ego_description: walking through the walled passage with smoke visible rising in the distance ahead

entered.detail: tall ancient stone walls enclosing the path on both sides
distant smoke rising from a settlement or campfire ahead

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow corridor between high stone walls, blocking much of the sky. The character continues forward as the stone obelisk passes to the left, with a distant smoke plume becoming visible ahead above the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open palm grove with scattered rocks

events.description: exiting the walled corridor into open palm grove area with wider visibility

agents.ego_description: walking through the palm grove as the path widens, approaching the distant settlement

entered.detail: dense cluster of palm trees lining both sides of the widening path
scattered rocks and boulders along the left side of the trail
collection of structures and ruins visible through the haze ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the walls, the environment opens into a wide palm grove with dense vegetation on both sides. The path widens as the character approaches the distant settlement, with rocky terrain visible on the left and the smoke plume growing larger ahead.

events.description: approaching the settlement with visible ruins and rising smoke from campfires

agents.ego_description: approaching the smoky settlement area with ruined stone structures becoming clearly visible

entered.detail: ancient stone ruins and collapsed walls of the settlement
thick smoke rising from multiple campfires within the settlement

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the destination, a ruined settlement with stone structures on the left and thick campfire smoke filling the center of view. The palm grove gives way to the settlement perimeter as the path leads directly into the smoky ruins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a grand temple avenue into the smoky ruins of a distant settlement. It begins with the character walking along a sandy path flanked by large sphinx statues and stone walls under a bright midday sun, heading toward a distant obelisk. As the camera moves forward, the environment tightens into a narrow corridor between high stone walls that obscure the sky before the obelisk passes to the left and a plume of smoke appears on the horizon. The scene then opens into a wide palm grove with dense vegetation and rocky terrain, where the path expands as the smoke plume grows larger. Finally, the palm grove gives way to the perimeter of a ruined settlement, leading the camera directly into the thick campfire smoke filling the stone ruins.
